name: Picante Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the bread flour and cornmeal.
2. Add the yeast and picante sauce to the dry ingredients.
3. Stir until all the ingredients are well combined.
4. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
5. Let the dough rise until doubled in size.
6. Preheat your oven according to package instructions.
7. Bake the bread at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack before slicing.
